This section presents preliminary information on smart contracts,
function visibility, and performance comparison between well-kno
traditional financial systems.
2.1  Smart contracts.
The blockchain is a foundational design pattern for facilitating pure
tion initiated by cryptocurrencies evolved into smart contracts. Ethe
by introducing the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), a Turing-co
both deployment and execution of codified arbitrary business log
Solidity is the dominant language for smart contracts in Ethereum.
technical information of Solidity required in this study.
Terminology of Roles and Responsibilities. Ethereum transitio
Proof of Stake (PoS) with The Merge in 2022, changing the participa
In PoS, validators have two main responsibilities: block proposi
selected as the proposer using a pseudo-random selection algorithm
proposer compiles a block by selecting a set of transactions, exe
network. The second responsibility is performed by attestor who
correctness, checking for invalid transactions or inconsistencies. If
rejected through the consensus process. Terminology in the literat
Some references distinguish miners and validators—where miners
while validators perform attesting [10]. Others, such as [29], use pr
this study, we adhere to the updated Ethereum convention and re
responsibilities as proposer and attestor.

already persisted on the blockchain and those announced but not y

3.2  Conflict Analysis
This system utilizes an oracle to detect conflicts between transactio
publicly accessible, the oracle analyzes contract logic to identify
information to validators to compute the schedule. A detailed expla
is beyond the scope of this paper which focus on the solution arch
However, the feasibility of such an oracle is supported by exist
analysis.
Specifically, conflict detection between smart contract functio
established static analysis techniques used in conventional software
data flow analysis [24] are commonly used to determine whether d
memory locations, which is crucial for detecting conflicts in concur
race condition detection methods [12, 14] have been employed in
identify such conflicts at compile time, preventing unsafe parall
scheduling approach, which use static analysis to detect such funct
existing methods.
